mapper.sql: id, project_id, task_type, biz_type, biz_id, status, current_stage, retry_count, max_retry_count, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, created_by, updated_by
id, project_id, task_id, stage_code, status, input_summary, output_summary, error_message, started_at, finished_at, cost_ms, created_at
mapper.select: select from generate_task where id = #{taskId} and deleted = 0
mapper.update:
update generate_task set status = #{nextStatus}, current_stage = #{currentStage}, error_message = #{errorMessage},
started_at = coalesce(started_at, now()),
finished_at = now(),
updated_at = now() where id = #{taskId} and status = #{currentStatus} and deleted = 0

update generate_task set status = #{nextStatus}, retry_count = retry_count + 1, error_message = null, finished_at = null, updated_at = now() where id = #{taskId} and status = #{currentStatus} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select from task_stage_log where task_id = #{taskId} and deleted = 0 order by created_at asc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into task_stage_log ( project_id, task_id, stage_code, status, input_summary, output_summary, error_message, started_at, finished_at, cost_ms, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{projectId}, #{taskId}, #{stageCode}, #{status}, #{inputSummary}, #{outputSummary}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{costMs}, now(), now() )
